content.text:

Regarding file organization, I notice the files `.geomconf_2492.xyz.view.json`, `file_log.txt`, and `geomconf_2492.xyz` require organization into appropriate folders. question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 18, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
